allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('bin:', json.dumps\(d.get\('bin',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('description:', d.get\('description'\)\); print\('bin:', json.dumps\(d.get\('bin',{}\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('bin:', json.dumps\(d.get\('bin',{}\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; results=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], '-', r.get\('description',''\)\) for r in results[:5]]")
